payload.message: Run your nightly dream routine. Read DREAM-ROUTINE.md and follow the process exactly. Read today's daily log from memory/, distill it, update the rolling digest, and archive old distillations.
Run your nightly dream routine. Read DREAM-ROUTINE.md and follow the process exactly. Read today's daily log from memory/, distill it, update the rolling digest, and archive old distillations.

Run the morning standup brief. For each of the following repos: anujj-ti/agentic-setup, call scripts/standup-brief.sh --repo OWNER/REPO (using exec tool). Aggregate all results and send a formatted summary to Anuj via Telegram. Format: start with 'Good morning! Here is your overnight summary:' then list: PRs merged overnight (from merged_prs), CI failures (from ci_failures), PRs needing review (from stale_prs). If no activity in a category, say 'None'. Keep the total message under 4000 characters. If standup-brief.sh returns ok:false for any repo, include the error in the message.
Run your CI polling routine. Execute scripts/poll-ci.sh and report the result. If new failures are found, the script will send Telegram alerts automatically.

Run the autonomous issue monitor. Execute scripts/devbot-issue-monitor.sh anujj-ti/agentic-setup and report the result. If new issues were picked up, log the pickup count. If the script exits non-zero, report the error.
Run the stale claim guard. Execute scripts/devbot-stale-claim-guard.sh anujj-ti/agentic-setup and report the result. If any stale claims were unclaimed, include the count in your response.
